violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice scoop found stored in a dirty bucket near ice machine. Scoop should be stored in a clean location.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of refrigerated units were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Dish machine was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. Bags of clean linens were found on the floor of the basement storage area. Linens should be stored off of the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor throughout the kitchen, especially under equipment, was found dirty. Floor should be cleaned and maintained clean.
